evidence_items.description: Spindle temperature Cohen's d=7.98 between Grade A and C
evidence_items.details: A mean=38.4°C, B=44.8°C, C=68.7°C. r=0.956 with surface roughness.

evidence_items.description: Spindle vibration Cohen's d=6.39 between Grade A and C
evidence_items.details: A mean=0.66 mm/s, B=1.35 mm/s, C=4.81 mm/s. r=0.993 with surface roughness.

evidence_items.description: Coolant temperature Cohen's d=4.11 between Grade A and C
evidence_items.details: A mean=24.7°C, B=25.5°C, C=29.2°C. r=0.875 with surface roughness.

evidence_items.description: Spindle speed and feed rate NOT significantly different across defect grades (ANOVA p>0.14)
Tool age effect is moderate (d=0.49) and monotonic
evidence_items.details: Defect rate 41.6% at tool age 0-10 → 86.4% at tool age 70-80.

evidence_items.description: Within each tool age group, spindle condition dominates defect classification
evidence_items.details: Grade C parts consistently show spindle temp >60°C regardless of tool age. Grade A parts always have spindle temp <42°C.
Cp roughness=0.608, Cp dimensional=0.522, Cpk even lower.
